example.role: Senior Business Analyst / Acting Product Owner
example.summary: Led data analytics and product requirements for an enterprise SaaS platform. Owned the product roadmap for the internal analytics cockpit from discovery to launch, reducing reporting latency by 95%.
responsibilities: Authored 14 product specifications adopted directly by engineering without revision
Designed and led SQL telemetry architecture reducing query latency from 5 days to 2 hours
Managed sprint backlogs and user story prioritization alongside technical product managers
Collaborated with UX designers to map customer journey flows and friction points
Presented product roadmap monthly to VP of Product and Director of Engineering
Facilitated cross-functional workshops aligning 4 business units on shared metric taxonomy
impactMetrics: Reduced reporting latency by 95% through denormalized DB architecture
Authored 14 specs adopted directly into engineering backlog
Analytics cockpit adopted by 100% of product leadership in 3 weeks

example.summary: Delivered requirements and process redesign across 6 enterprise client implementations. Led onboarding friction analysis resulting in 22% activation improvement. Standardised API contract validation eliminating 40 engineering hours per sprint.
responsibilities: Conducted 12+ stakeholder interviews per engagement to define business requirements
Mapped AS-IS and TO-BE process flows for enterprise workflow migrations
Built automated API contract validation pipeline integrated into CI/CD
Facilitated usability sessions with end users and synthesized findings into PRD recommendations
Wrote user stories with detailed acceptance criteria for 6 engineering teams
Coordinated with 6 external API integration partners on schema standardisation
impactMetrics: Improved client onboarding activation rate by 22%
Eliminated 40 engineering hours per sprint via API automation
Delivered 6 successful enterprise client implementations on time
Mobile activation rate increased from 12% to 41%

example.summary: First professional BA role in a boutique management consulting firm. Supported senior consultants on process audit and digital transformation engagements for mid-market clients.
responsibilities: Documented current-state business processes for 4 mid-market client engagements
Prepared stakeholder interview guides and synthesis reports
Built SQL queries for client data extraction and trend analysis
Assisted with business case development and ROI modelling for digital initiatives
Created wireframe mockups for client-facing reporting dashboards
impactMetrics: Supported 4 successful client engagements in first year
Promoted to BA role after 12-month junior track
Recognised for SQL data extraction work that saved 6 hours per client reporting cycle
